subject: english
topic_title: Vocabulary Development: Words Associated with the Library
learning_objectives: Define a library and identify its purpose
Learn and use vocabulary specific to library settings

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: A library is a room or building containing books that can be looked at or borrowed.

sections.heading: Library Vocabulary
sections.content:
bindery – a place where books are bound or repaired
catalogue – a list of items (books) available in a collection, especially in a library
entry card – a card on which details about a book are recorded
shelf-guide – instructions (especially numbers) showing which books are on a particular shelf
encyclopedia – a book or set of books containing facts about many different subjects or one particular subject
